name: CalSync
tagline: Smart scheduling that eliminates the back-and-forth. Share your availability, book meetings, and sync calendars across platforms. Free for everyone.
metaDescription: CalSync is a free scheduling tool that replaces Calendly. Share availability links, automate bookings, sync all your calendars, and send reminders. No per-seat pricing.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📅</text></svg>

features.title: Booking Links
features.desc: Create shareable scheduling links with custom availability windows. Invitees pick a time that works, and it's instantly confirmed with calendar invites sent to both parties.

features.title: Multi-Calendar Sync
features.desc: Connect Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, and more. CalSync checks availability across all your calendars to prevent double-bookings automatically.

features.title: Team Scheduling
features.desc: Round-robin assignments, collective availability for group meetings, and pooled scheduling for sales teams. Route bookings to the right person automatically.

features.title: Automated Reminders
features.desc: Reduce no-shows with customizable email and SMS reminders. Set multiple reminder intervals and include pre-meeting prep materials or questionnaires.

features.title: Time Zone Intelligence
features.desc: Automatic time zone detection for every participant. Display availability in the invitee's local time and handle daylight saving transitions seamlessly.

features.title: Workflow Automations
features.desc: Trigger actions when meetings are booked, rescheduled, or cancelled. Auto-send confirmation emails, create CRM records, or post to Slack channels.

includes: Unlimited booking links and event types
Google, Outlook, and Apple Calendar sync
Embed scheduling widget on your site
